faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Glen Oaks typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment in Glen Oaks?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment service in Glen Oaks and throughout Queens. Our team understands that flea infestations require immediate attention, especially in homes with children and pets, so we prioritize rapid response times.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We'll provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry, typically recommending that pets and people stay out of treated areas for 2-4 hours while products dry.

faqs.question: Do I need multiple treatments to eliminate fleas completely?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations in Glen Oaks require a follow-up treatment 10-14 days after the initial service to target newly hatched fleas. Our comprehensive approach includes treating all life stages and infested areas, and we guarantee our work with free re-treatments if fleas return within the warranty period.
